<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Session; /** * @author Kevin Bond <kevinbond@gmail.com> */ interface SessionFactoryInterface { public function createSession(): SessionInterface; }
